Rooms & Suites

Rest, Reimagined

Over 100 rooms and suites, each a private world of light, silence and considered comfort.

42 m² 2 guests1 King

A serene urban retreat with floor-to-ceiling glass, hand-tufted linens and a marble spa bath.

Deluxe Twin

42 m² 2 guests2 Twin

The same considered comfort as our Deluxe King, arranged for two — ideal for colleagues or friends.

₹18,500 / night
Signature RoomAvailable

Premier Garden King

46 m² 2 guests1 King

Wake to greenery on a low floor, with a private planted balcony and birdsong instead of traffic.

A THE VIVI Signature

The Lluci Restaurant

Two Michelin StarsWorld's 50 Best · #14

Housed within THE VIVI yet a universe of its own — Lluci is a two-Michelin-star theatre of seasonal cuisine, rare wine and table-side fire. Step inside for a completely separate experience.

Weddings at VIVI

Say Forever in Style

From intimate rooftop vows to 800-guest ballroom galas, our wedding atelier choreographs every moment — décor, cuisine, film and light.

Up to 800 guests
Bespoke banquet menus
In-house cinematography
Live entertainment
Business & Conferences

Where Deals Are Made

Six configurable spaces, enterprise-grade AV and a dedicated events team that runs your day like clockwork.

The VIVI Life

Everything, Elevated

A subterranean spa, a rooftop infinity pool, a performance gym and a members-style lounge — your day, curated.

Wellness

The VIVI Spa

A subterranean sanctuary of hydrotherapy pools, salt caves and signature rituals.

Leisure

Infinity Pool

A rooftop infinity edge dissolving into the skyline, open from dawn to midnight.

Fitness

Performance Gym

Technogym suite, private trainers and a recovery lab with cryotherapy.

Social

The Sky Lounge

A members-style lounge with rare spirits, live jazz and panoramic dusk views.

Curated Offers

Suite Escape

Three nights in any suite with daily breakfast and a spa ritual for two.

Romance at VIVI

from ₹42,000

Wellness Retreat

A five-night reset with daily spa, yoga at dawn and a nutritionist-designed menu.

from ₹1,15,000
About THE VIVI

A Modern Icon of Hospitality 

Born from a belief that luxury is not excess but intention, THE VIVI is a living landmark — architecture, cuisine and service composed into a single, seamless art form.

2007

THE VIVI opens its doors with 40 rooms and a single restaurant.

2014

The subterranean spa and rooftop infinity pool are unveiled.

2019

Lluci earns its first Michelin star; the penthouse floor is added.

2025

Named World's Leading Luxury Hotel with 100+ suites and villas.

World's Leading Luxury Hotel
2025 · Global Travel Awards
Best Hotel Spa in Asia
2024 · Wellness Guild
Design Hotel of the Year
2023 · Architizer
18
Years of Excellence
